name: Progressive Side Step Reverse Turn
preceding_figure_names: Back Corte, Brush Tap, Closed Promenade, Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Four Step Change, Open Finish, Open Promenade, Outside Swivel, Promenade Link, Reverse Outside Swivel, Rock Turn, Walk
following_figure_names: Walk (LF), Progressive Side Step, Progressive Link, Back Corte, LF Rock, Closed Promenade (at end of last step of preceding figure, using Open Finish, keep feet in place and turn Lady to PP, count &), Open Promenade (at end of last step of preceding figure, using Open Finish, keep feet in place and turn Lady to PP, count &), Outside Swivel, Four Step, Brush Tap, Fallaway Four Step, Five Step, Contra Check
notes:
Total amount of Turn: 3/4 to L
Note: After steps 1-4, the following endings may be used
Back Corté SQQS
Rock on LF, Rock on RF, Back Corté QQS, QQS, SQQS

steps.action: LF fwd in CBMP, strong compression, rotation, progressive side step
comments: Quite a bit of turn on the progressive side step. Dancing "U" turn.

steps.action: RF to side and slightly back, FDC against LOD, IE of foot, 1/4 to L
comments: S: LF fwd in CBMP | Almost against LOD | H | 1/8 to L | CBM

steps.action: RF back in CBMP, BDC, BH, CBM
comments: For left turning figures, do not allow L shoulder to go beyond the hips.

steps.action: LF to side and slightly fwd, BDC against LOD, IE of foot, 1/4 to L
comments: S: RF back in CBMP | Almost backing against LOD | BH | 1/8 to L | CBM
